title: The 2026 LA Invitational Returns to The Cub House on June 13th and 14th!
content:
The 2026 LA Invitational returns to San Marino’s The Cub House with a weekend of bike riding, bike swaps, and a bike/car show. For the Ride Day, there are three options this year, the Single Scoop at 31 miles with 4500′, Double Scoop with 53 miles and 7,200′, and the Triple Scoop with a whopping 70 miles and 9,500′. There will be a few surprises out on the course this year as well!

You can buy tickets now at The Cub House!

And check out our previous Reportage in the Related Archives below!

The post The 2026 LA Invitational Returns to The Cub House on June 13th and 14th! appeared first on The Radavist.
author: John Watson
